records.quote: Room A was a revelation! The sound was incredibly detailed and dynamic.
records.author: john_doe123

records.quote: The VPI HW-40 was the star of the show! It delivered an unmatched level of detail and musicality.
records.author: jane_doe456

records.quote: The venue's acoustics were a bit of a letdown. Some rooms sounded muddied and lacking in detail.
records.author: bob_smith789

records.quote: The logistics of the show were well-organized, but the crowds made it difficult to spend as much time in each room as I would have liked.
records.author: jim_brown567

records.quote: Some rooms offered great value for the price, while others seemed overpriced for what they delivered.
records.author: mary_jones890

records.quote: Overall, AXPONA was a fantastic experience. I discovered some amazing new gear and met some great people.
records.author: john_doe123

records.quote: The industry was buzzing with excitement and innovation. It's clear that the audio world is moving in an exciting direction.
records.author: jane_doe456

records.quote: For those of you who do not want to read this entire write up I will be kind and put my summary up top in a bullet list. There was 3 of us who went. One musician, one loudspeaker builder, and one wife
records.author: Bmsluite

records.topic: Comparison of DIY loudspeakers to high-end HIFI brand loudspeakers
records.quote: I asked the question some months back: How do our loudspeakers compare to expensive, high end, HIFI brand loudspeakers? I have answers.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: Most of them do not sound good
records.author: Bmsluite

records.topic: Number of systems listened at AXPONA 2025
records.quote: We listened to 60 systems in one day.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: We then came home and listened to my systems.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: I see a lot of opinions--but no measurements (on-axis or better yet--polar sonograms) for even the DIY configurations. So it appears that the OP might have listening biases rather more likely than tha
records.author: Cask05

records.quote: Mofi - Boring looking right? #2 best speaker at the place. Insane sound out of a very ugly speaker.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: This guys spent all the time and money perfecting the design and insane sound out of a very ugly speaker.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: The range of products on display was impressive.

Overall, it was a fantastic event that I would highly recommend to any audiophile.

records.quote: The room setup was exceptional. The sound quality was superb and the system was well-balanced.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: The Pass Labs amplifiers were a standout. They delivered an incredibly clean and powerful sound.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: There were many great exhibitors showcasing a wide variety of products.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: For the price, AXPONA offered an incredible value.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: I was impressed by the use of DSP technology to optimize sound quality.
records.author: AllenB

records.quote: I had an amazing time at AXPONA. The sound quality was exceptional and I discovered some fantastic new products.

records.quote: The event was well-organized and easy to navigate.

records.quote: Overall, it was a fantastic event with many great products and systems to listen to.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: There was a wide range of products from various manufacturers, catering to different tastes and budgets.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: The rooms were well-designed and the acoustics were generally good.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: The exhibitors were knowledgeable and friendly, making the event enjoyable.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: I don't have the knowledge base to have an opinion on this.

records.quote: I had a fantastic time at AXPONA. The variety of equipment and the knowledgeable exhibitors made it an unforgettable experience.
records.author: Bmsluite

records.quote: I was always impressed with White. They took the high road in a rigorous mathematical and principled way.
records.author: perrymarshall

records.quote: Well this was a trade off. I'm a sloucher in my chair. I move more vertically in my chair than I do horizontally. I modelled it both ways and decided to vertical and hortizontal offset of the drivers
records.author: weltersys

records.quote: I modelled it both ways and decided to vertical and hortizontal offset of the drivers was better to have a slight horizontal cancellation with
records.author: weltersys

records.quote: So let's better stop. It's not worth the effort.

records.quote: This thread has gone so far off track, and branched into so many sub topics, I don't think you need to worry about it...

records.quote: AXPONA audio show has grown into one of the biggest high-end shows in the world.
records.author: MylesBAstor
records.source_title: What's Best Forum — Thoughts and Reflections on AXPONA 2025

records.quote: Show organizers reported 10,910 people attended this year’s event; this represents a 5% increase in attendance from last year.
records.author: MylesBAstor
records.source_title: What's Best Forum — Thoughts and Reflections on AXPONA 2025

records.quote: Lastly, there was lots of live music at this year’s show including the Kyle Asche Organ Quartet on Friday night, Patricia Barber on Saturday night, as well as Adam Czerwinski and his group performing
records.author: MylesBAstor
records.source_title: What's Best Forum — Thoughts and Reflections on AXPONA 2025

records.topic: products seen most around the show
records.quote:
Electronics: CH-Precision/PASS/D’Agostino
Speakers: Magico/Stenheim/Marten
Turntables: VPI/Well Tempered/Reed/AMG
Digital: WADAX/DCS/Lampizator/Taiko
Cables: Cardas/Nordost/Turnbull/Audioquest/Kubala-
records.author: MylesBAstor
records.source_title: What's Best Forum — Thoughts and Reflections on AXPONA 2025

records.quote: There was one thing that stood out like a sore thumb in going from room to room and listening to my recordings. That was the presence or in so many rooms the complete absence of any sense of ambient r
records.author: MylesBAstor
records.source_title: What's Best Forum — Thoughts and Reflections on AXPONA 2025

records.topic: separation of speakers in large rooms
records.quote: Conversely, I felt bad for companies like Burmester, Vandersteen, Monarch Audio and many others trying to shoehorn their audio systems into rooms that made college dorm rooms feel roomy.
records.author: MylesBAstor
records.source_title: What's Best Forum — Thoughts and Reflections on AXPONA 2025

records.quote: Ugh. Streaming, more often than not, was the name of the game.
records.author: MylesBAstor
records.source_title: What's Best Forum — Thoughts and Reflections on AXPONA 2025

records.author: sargonicuse

records.quote: The business, engineering and manufacturing acumen on this audio form is non existent. Why I give zero stock to the statement and opinions expressed in this forum.
Those who can do, those who can’t just bitch and moan.

I just had VAS rewire a defective tonearm and replace a missing stylus on a cartridge's cantilever. Luckily, they had parts in-stock, because they told me they generally could not get new parts, the s

Aren't a lot of companies (like PS Audio, Dynaudio, etc.) having parts made in Asia? So, it's not an all or nothing issue but the tariffs could affect the availability or price of parts for non-Asia b
It’s not just one part that’s at issue. Using Audio Research Corp as an example, just a guess 98% of the electronic components in their audio equipment is imported from China, Taiwan, or Vietnam.
If it was my business I would do the $150 until it goes back to normal and lower the price to $100 in the future.
Using Audioholics as an example, just a guess 98% of the electronic components in their audio equipment is imported from China, Taiwan, or Vietnam.
